mapper.select: select id, project_id, archive_type, item_name, attachment_id, repository_url, status, archived_by, archived_at from archive_item where project_id = #{projectId} and is_deleted = 0 order by created_at desc

select l.id, l.project_id, l.category, l.title, l.content, l.author_id, u.real_name as author_name, l.created_at from lesson_learned l left join sys_user u on u.id = l.author_id where l.project_id = #{projectId} and l.is_deleted = 0 order by l.created_at desc

select l.id, l.project_id, l.category, l.title, l.content, l.author_id, u.real_name as author_name, l.created_at from lesson_learned l left join sys_user u on u.id = l.author_id where l.project_id = #{projectId} and l.id = #{id} and l.is_deleted = 0

select r.id, r.report_type, r.title, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.content_json, r.status, r.attachment_id, a.file_url as attachment_url, r.generated_by, u.real_name as generated_by_name, r.generated_at from report_record r left join attachment_info a on a.id = r.attachment_id and a.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_user u on u.id = r.generated_by where r.project_id = #{projectId} and r.is_deleted = 0 order by r.generated_at desc

select r.id, r.report_type, r.title, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.content_json, r.status, r.attachment_id, a.file_url as attachment_url, r.generated_by, u.real_name as generated_by_name, r.generated_at from report_record r left join attachment_info a on a.id = r.attachment_id and a.is_deleted = 0 left join sys_user u on u.id = r.generated_by where r.project_id = #{projectId} and r.id = #{id} and r.is_deleted = 0
select id, file_name, file_url, file_size, file_type, biz_type, biz_id, uploaded_by, uploaded_at from attachment_info where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: update attachment_info set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
